compiled_state.title: Add exploration-decomposition.md references to brainstorm, fix-bug, and implementation-plan
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Brainstorm SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "exploration-decomposition" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Fix-bug SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "exploration-decomposition" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Implementation-plan SKILL.md references exploration-decomposition.md
  Verify: grep -q "exploration-decomposition" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] References are placed at the point where each skill performs exploration (not at the top or bottom as boilerplate)
  Verify: grep -B5 "exploration-decomposition" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -qi "search\|explor\|research\|discover\|context\|investigate"
- [ ] All compliance tests from task f5a5-dfa5 pass (GREEN)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_exploration_protocol_compliance.py --tb=short -q

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from task f5a5-dfa5 for skill references must pass (GREEN) after this task completes.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (modify — if not already referencing)
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (modify — if not already referencing)
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (modify — if not already referencing)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — References already added by cf22-3308 (brainstorm, fix-bug, implementation-plan all reference exploration-decomposition.md).
comments.author: Main
